description_long: This rifle features a modern, tactical design with a predominantly black finish and angular contours. The body is constructed with a combination of metal and polymer, giving it a robust yet lightweight appearance. It is equipped with a scope mounted on the top rail for enhanced aiming precision, and the handguard has a ribbed texture for improved grip. The stock is integrated into the main body in a bullpup configuration, with the magazine located behind the trigger group. Red accents are visible on the grip and magazine area, adding a distinctive visual touch. The barrel is long and straight, with a squared-off muzzle that may accommodate a muzzle device.
description: A modern black tactical rifle with a bullpup configuration, scope, and red accent details. Features a ribbed handguard, integrated stock, and a long barrel.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, scope, ribbed handguard, and red-accented grip and magazine area.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel's muzzle and the narrow profile of the rifle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the scope, handguard, and integrated stock, mirroring the details of the first side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the stock and the compact bullpup design.
